svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Detection-Sequence" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-749" dy="-240" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1420" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;fontColor=#333333;" value="Face Crop Studio — Detection Pipeline (runtime sequence: YuNetDetector::detect_path)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1340" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Caller
(fcs-cli / fcs-gui)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="170" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="YuNetDetector
(fcs-core)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="170" x="290" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Preprocessor
(CPU / WGPU)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="170" x="540" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="DetectorBackend
(tract CPU / wgpu GPU)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="170" x="790" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="postprocess
(NMS / dedup)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="170" x="1040" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L6" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="face_cropper
(fcs-core)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="120" x="1290" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.10;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.10;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2" value="detect_path(path)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.15;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.19;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2" value="load_image(path) → DynamicImage"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="500" y="190" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.24;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.24;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L3" value="preprocess(image, cfg)
resize→640², RGB→BGR CHW"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" source="L3" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=0.32;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.32;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2" value="PreprocessOutput { tensor[1,3,640,640], scale_x, scale_y }"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.41;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.41;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L4" value="backend.run(tensor)
«onnx_inference»"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" source="L4" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=0.49;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.49;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2" value="raw Tensor (N×16 rows)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m7" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.58;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.58;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L5" value="apply_postprocess(raw, scale, cfg)
decode → score filter → rescale → NMS → dedup → top_k"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m8" edge="1" parent="1" source="L5" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=0.66;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.66;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2" value="Vec<Detection> (bbox + 5 landmarks)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m9" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=0.74;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.74;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L1" value="DetectionOutput { detections, scale_x, scale_y, original_size }"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m10" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.83;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.83;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L6" value="crop_face_from_image(img, crop_region) [per face]"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m11" edge="1" parent="1" source="L6" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=0.91;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.91;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L1" value="cropped image → quality filter → save"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#cccccc;fillColor=#fbfbfb;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#555555;spacingLeft=8;" value="Solid filled arrow = synchronous call
Grey dashed arrow = return value
Steps 10–11 (crop & save) run only on the CLI / batch path, once per detected face." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="640" x="40" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Solid filled arrow = synchronous call
Grey dashed arrow = return value
Steps 10–11 (crop & save) run only on the CLI / batch path, once per detected face.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
